stemHtml: During approach for landing, ATC decides to discontinue vectoring of the aircraft. What instruction might the pilot anticipate receiving?

options.a: Resume own navigation, direct to (name of the point), heading 150, distance to the point 60 NM.
options.b: Resume own navigation, direct to (name of the point) distance to touchdown 86 NM.
options.d: Direct to (name of the point), distance to touchdown 86 NM.
